hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path') && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(js|ts|jsx|tsx|vue|css)$' && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
echo '--- Post-compaction context ---' && git log --oneline -10 2>/dev/null && echo '--- Uncommitted changes ---' && git diff --stat HEAD 2>/dev/null || true
